title: IslandCraft
description: A datapack made for an island based survival world, with special recipes and advancements to make the island experience fun!
body:
This is a simple datapack that adds new advancements and recipes, here are a few of the things to show.

Recipes:

Dried Kelp (made with 4 kelp and 1 netherrack)

Apple (made with 4 acacia saplings and 1 netherrack)

Advancements:

Castaway (consume Dried Kelp)

Mining Trip (hold a Copper Ingot)

Another World (enter a Basalt Deltas)

Escapee (enter a Forest)
